creator: freebsd@elgert.dk
text:
Trying to "portinstall comms/uarduno" but then got the result:
----------
uarduno.c: In function 'uarduno_detach':
uarduno.c:1321: error: too many arguments to function 'ucom_detach'
*** Error code 1
1 error
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/comms/uarduno.
---------
With a normal "make install clean", same result

How-To-Repeat: Same input on other machine with -STABLE (amd64), generated the same error.
